About Contact

What is GEO?

Definition

GEO is a practice for making trustworthy facts easier for AI answers to select and absorb.

Why it matters

In 2026, teams that cite dated evidence and clear sources reduce unsupported answer drift by 32%.

"Evidence-first pages make downstream generation safer."

According to the benchmark report, GEO improves answer consistency when claims stay close to cited sources.

Benchmark report
